definition: each generation claim is attacked; only claims confirmed by simulation survive

tests.claim: rules generate the observed hub dominance
tests.evidence: simulated hub share 0.034 vs observed 0.087; super-linear attachment does not close the gap — the hub is not generated
consistency is a property of the activation matrix M, not of graph topology; the grammar models only topology

tests.claim: rules generate the exact giant SCC
tests.evidence: a large SCC emerges but its size/membership is not matched exactly

verdict: local generation (motif vocabulary) survives; global generation (hub, consistency, exact SCC) is falsified or out of scope — generation is PARTIAL and LOCAL
